# `StrCmp`

**Systems:** C64, MEGA65, PLUS4, C128, VIC20, PET, X16, OK64  
**Parameters:** `s, s`

---

<div markdown="0" class="trse-help-body">

<h3>StrCmp( [ input string / pointer ], [ compare string ]);</h3>
<ul>
    <li>[ input string ] - Input string / pointer </li>
    <li>[ Compare string ] - String to compare with</li>
</ul>


<h3>Description</h3>
<p>
Compares two strings and returns either true (1) or false (0).
</p>

<h3>Example</h3>
<code>
    if (strcmp(sp,"HELLO")) then
    begin
        printString("YOU SAID HELLO.",0,40);
    end;

</code>


</div>
